items.title: Atlanta Hawks cap situation after trading Zaccharie Risacher for Lu Dort and Ryan Nembhard.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Atlanta Hawks cap situation after trading Zaccharie Risacher for Lu Dort and Ryan Nembhard.

Dort is currently extension-eligible for up to four years, $95 million over the next six months. He could get more after.

Nembhard will become a restricted free agent after this season.

items.title: [Charania] BREAKING: The Oklahoma City Thunder trading All-Defensive wing Lu Dort to the Atlanta Hawks in a three-team deal that sends three second-round picks to OKC, former No. 1 pick Zaccharie Risacher to the Dallas Mavericks and Ryan Nembhard to Atlanta, sources tell ESPN.
items.author: Subject-Property-343
items.body_excerpt: BREAKING: The Oklahoma City Thunder trading All-Defensive wing Lu Dort to the Atlanta Hawks in a three-team deal that sends three second-round picks to OKC, former No. 1 pick Zaccharie Risacher to the Dallas Mavericks and Ryan Nembhard to Atlanta, sources tell ESPN.…
